title: phyllanthus subscandens
intro: Phyllanthus subscandens, also known as the rain tree or strychnine tree, is a tropical plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and roots, which are rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins. The medicinal properties of Phyllanthus subscandens have been found to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-diabetic effects, as well as potential liver-protective and anti-cancer properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to promote overall health and well-being.
